particulars.description: Land and buildings at gatherley road industrial estate brompton on swale, richmond north yorkshire. By way of fixed charge the benefit of all covenants and rights concerning the property and plant machinery fixtures fittings furniture equipment implements and utensils the goodwill of any business carried on at the property and the proceeds of any insurance affecting the property or assets.
